title: GameOptimizer
description: Improves performance, prevents lags, customize it yourself!
body:
✨ 📌 Slow down plant growth → Customizable speed (2, 3, 5 times slower) → Reduces server load from frequent block updates

✨ 🧹 Clearing the world of debris → Removes dropped items (rotten flesh, bones, etc.) → Customizable intervals and list of items to be removed

✨ ⏳ Piston slowdown → Fights lag from dupes and mass movements → Delayed trigger chance (customizable)

✨ ⚙️ Flexible config → Enable/disable every feature → Fine-tune parameters to fit any server

✨ 🔄 Command /optimizer reload → Update settings without rebooting the server

🔧 Compatibility: Paper 1.21.1, Java 17+

💡 Why install? ✔ Reduces lag without changing gameplay ✔ Simplicity - works out of the box ✔ Control - flexible settings for your server

🚀 Download / Install: in plugins/ → Done!
